full_name: IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 - Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes - Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells, and for batteries made from them, for use in portable applications - Part 2: Lithium systems
ocr_quality: 良好（PDF 直接提取，英文內容完整）

tests.test_name_zh: 恆壓連續充電測試（電池）

conditions.charging_method: 製造商規定的電流和標準電壓方法

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無洩漏

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.2.1 Continuous charging at constant voltage (cells): Fully charged cells are subjected for 7 days to a charge using the charging method for current and standard voltage specified by the cell manufacturer. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion, no leakage.

tests.test_name_zh: 高溫外殼應力測試（電池組）
tests.test_name_en: Case Stress at High Ambient Temperature (Battery)
tests.applicability: 僅適用於模塑外殼的電池組

criteria.description: 電池外殼無物理變形導致內部保護元件和電池暴露

exemptions: 不適用於非模塑外殼的電池組
tests.original_text_snippet: 7.2.2 Case stress at high ambient temperature (battery): The battery is placed in an air circulating oven at a temperature of 70 °C ± 2 °C for 7 h. Acceptance criteria: No physical distortion of the battery case resulting in exposure of internal protective components and cells.

conditions.duration: 24 小時或表面溫度下降 20%（取較早者）

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.1 External short-circuit (cell): Fully charge each cell according to the second procedure in 7.1.2. Store in an ambient temperature of 55 °C ± 5 °C. After stabilization for 1 h to 4 h, the cell is short-circuited by connecting the positive and negative terminals with a total external resistance of 80 mΩ ± 20 mΩ. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

conditions.duration: 24 小時或外殼溫度下降 20%（取較早者）
conditions.fault_simulation: 1-4 個樣品需模擬放電保護電路單一故障（如 MOSFET 短路、保險絲短路等）

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.2 External short-circuit (battery): A fully charged battery is short-circuited by connecting the positive and negative terminals with a total external resistance of 80 mΩ ± 20 mΩ. A single fault in the discharge protection circuit should be conducted on one to four of the five samples. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

conditions.observation: 靜置至少 1 小時後目視檢查

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.3 Free fall: Each cell or battery is dropped three times from a height of 1.0 m onto a flat concrete floor or metal floor. The cells or batteries are dropped so as to obtain impacts in random orientations. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

7.3.4 Thermal abuse (cells): The oven temperature is raised at a rate of 5 °C/min ± 2 °C/min to a temperature of 130 °C ± 2 °C. The cell remains at this temperature for 30 min. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

conditions.soc: 按 7.1.2 規定充滿電（在上限充電溫度下）
conditions.orientation: 圓柱型/方型：縱軸平行於擠壓面；鈕扣型：平面施壓

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.5 Crush (cells): The force for the crushing is applied by a device exerting a force of 13 kN ± 0.78 kN. Once the maximum force has been applied, or an abrupt voltage drop of one-third of the original voltage has been obtained, the force is released. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

conditions.soc: 按 7.1.1 規定放電至終止電壓
conditions.supply_voltage_single: 1.4 倍上限充電電壓（不超過 6.0 V）
conditions.supply_voltage_series: 1.2 倍上限充電電壓/串聯電池數
conditions.duration: 直到溫度穩定（30 分鐘內變化小於 10°C）或恢復至室溫

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸；過充保護電路（如有）應能保護電池

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.6 Over-charging of battery: Sample batteries shall then be charged at a constant current of 2.0 It A, using a supply voltage which is 1.4 times the upper limit charging voltage for single cell batteries or 1.2 times per cell for series connected multi-cell batteries. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

conditions.soc: 放電至製造商規定的下限放電電壓
conditions.special_case: 若 90 分鐘內達到負上限電壓，則減小電流維持該電壓至試驗結束

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸；可採用電池或系統中的保護裝置

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.7 Forced discharge (cells): The discharged cell is then subjected to a forced discharge at 1 It A to the negative value of the upper limit charging voltage. The total duration for the forced discharge testing is 90 min. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion.

conditions.cycle_count: 12 次循環（每方向約 3 小時）
conditions.directions: 3 個互相垂直方向（其中之一垂直於端子面）

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無破裂、無洩漏、無排氣

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.8.1 Vibration: Test batteries shall be subjected to sinusoidal vibration according to Table 3. This cycle shall be repeated 12 times for a total of approximately 3 h for each of three mutually perpendicular mounting positions. Acceptance criteria: No fire, no explosion, no rupture, no leakage or venting.

conditions.shock_count: 每個方向 3 次，共 3 個方向（18 次）

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無破裂、無洩漏、無排氣

tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.8.2 Mechanical shock: Each test battery shall be subjected to three shocks in each direction of three mutually perpendicular mounting positions for a total of 18 shocks. Peak acceleration: 150 gn, Pulse duration: 6 ms. Acceptance criteria: No leakage, no venting, no rupture, no explosion and no fire.

tests.test_name_zh: 強制內部短路測試（電池）
tests.applicability: 僅適用於圓柱型和方型鋰離子電池（不適用於鋰離子聚合物電池和鈕扣電池）
tests.regional_requirement: 僅法國、日本、韓國、瑞士要求

conditions.soc: 按製造商建議充電，然後以 0.2 It A 放電至終止電壓
conditions.sample_count: 每個測試溫度 5 個樣品
conditions.method: 使用鎳顆粒刺入捲芯模擬內部短路
termination_criteria: 壓力達到 800 N（圓柱型）或 400 N（方型）
conditions.hold_time: 檢測到短路後保持 30 秒

criteria.description: 應無起火；記錄發生內部短路時的壓力

exemptions: 不適用於鋰離子聚合物電池
僅法國、日本、韓國、瑞士要求
tests.original_text_snippet: 7.3.9 Design evaluation – Forced internal short-circuit (cells): A forced internal short-circuit test for cylindrical cells and prismatic cells shall not cause a fire. This is a country specific test, which is only applicable to France, Japan, Korea and Switzerland and is not required on lithium ion polymer cells.

tests.test_name_zh: 鈕扣電池內部交流電阻測量
tests.test_name_en: Measurement of Internal AC Resistance for Coin Cells

conditions.measurement_method: Annex D 規定的交流電阻測量方法
conditions.threshold: 內部電阻 ≤ 3 Ω 的鈕扣電池需按 Table 1 測試

criteria.description: 測量內部交流電阻以確定測試適用性

exemptions: 內部電阻 > 3 Ω 的鈕扣電池免除 Table 1 中的測試
tests.original_text_snippet: Annex D (normative) Measurement of the internal AC resistance for coin cells. Coin cells with internal resistance less than or equal to 3 Ω shall be tested in accordance with Table 1.

exemptions_summary.exemption: 僅適用於法國、日本、韓國、瑞士；不適用於鈕扣電池和鋰離子聚合物電池
僅適用於模塑外殼的電池組
內部電阻 > 3 Ω 的鈕扣電池免除 Table 1 中的測試

metadata.extraction_method: Manual reading and analysis of complete .md file (PDF extraction)
metadata.ocr_quality_notes: OCR 品質良好，使用 PDF 直接提取，英文內容完整，章節編號清晰，表格結構完整。IEC 62133-2 是便攜式鋰電池的國際基礎標準。
